content:
✅ **All 9 documentation files created successfully** at `D:\AI-Business\`.

## Files Created

| # | File | Size | Lines | Contents |
|---|------|------|-------|----------|
| 1 | `D:\AI-Business\README.md` | 37.7 KB | 709 | Master README with project overview, ASCII architecture diagram, directory structure, hardware specs, software stack, step-by-step run guide, troubleshooting tables, agent handoff protocol, maintenance guide, and quick reference card |
| 2 | `D:\AI-Business\docs\AGENT_HANDOFF.md` | 37.9 KB | 805 | AI agent handoff doc with 10-item system state checklist, PowerShell validation scripts, log reading guide, full Python diagnostic script, key file locations table, API endpoint details with JSON examples, error recovery procedures with scripts, health check commands, 14-row failure modes table, 10-step resumption protocol |
| 3 | `D:\AI-Business\docs\ARCHITECTURE.md` | 50.9 KB | 1024 | Technical architecture with ASCII component diagram, 7-step data flow, full API contracts for ComfyUI REST + WebSocket and Ollama with JSON request/response examples, file naming conventions, KDP PDF and Etsy wall art output specs, model specification tables, LoRA details, pipeline stages with retry logic, concurrency model with semaphore scheduling |
| 4 | `D:\AI-Business\docs\MODEL_GUIDE.md` | 17.8 KB | 401 | Complete model inventory table, SDXL vs Flux comparison, text encoder loading strategy, print resolution reference table, LoRA weight tuning guide, Qwen 2.5 14B with custom Modelfile and Python integration, full Kohya_ss training guide with RTX 5070 12GB optimizations and sample command, model swap procedures with checklists, recommended Civitai LoRA categories, VRAM management with pipeline budget table and OOM troubleshooting |
| 5 | `D:\AI-Business\skills\SKILL_comfyui_generation.md` | 6.1 KB | 166 | ComfyUI API skill: startup, API reference, workflow loading, Python queue/monitor/download code, coloring book example (SDXL + LoRA), wall art example (Flux), error handling with retry pattern |
| 6 | `D:\AI-Business\skills\SKILL_pdf_assembly.md` | 2.6 KB | 70 | PDF assembly skill: pdf_assembler.py CLI, KDP specs table, pixel dimension reference, verification function, error handling, example commands |
| 7 | `D:\AI-Business\skills\SKILL_listing_writer.md` | 4.3 KB | 131 | Listing writer skill: Ollama API, KDP description template, Etsy listing template (title/description/tags), SEO optimization, quality validation function, retry logic, end-to-end example |
| 8 | `D:\AI-Business\skills\SKILL_niche_research.md` | 4.6 KB | 121 | Niche research skill: 5-step research process, validation criteria table, scoring formula with worked example, niches.json schema, seasonal calendar, evergreen niches table |
| 9 | `D:\AI-Business\logs\README.md` | 2.9 KB | 81 | Logging system: 5 log files, format spec, severity levels, PowerShell/findstr reading commands, issue diagnosis patterns, rotation policy, alerting triggers |

**Total**: ~165 KB of documentation across 3,508 lines.
